_comment: A minimal user-extension manifest (review #secondary, Flow B 'one sentence → extension'). Registered via POST /extensions {sessionId, manifest}. The gateway materializes a CapabilitySource whose scan() projects these declarations into CapabilityEntry objects (the obsidian.vault.read example is what `obsidian.vault.read` below becomes). Conforms to ExtensionManifest in types.ts. Demonstrates the Obsidian Local REST API bearer-credential path via `secrets`.
label: Obsidian (Local REST API)

capabilities.name: vault.read
capabilities.label: Read Obsidian notes
capabilities.describe: Read Markdown from a local Obsidian vault by path or full-text search, so the agent can cite the user's personal knowledge base. Use when the task references the user's notes, prior decisions, or any local-only knowledge. Read-only: never mutates the vault.

query.description: Full-text or keyword search query. Mutually optional with `path`.

vault.description: Vault name; omit to use the default vault.
